Object.Description: A goldish gem, stuck in a pile of rubble, attracting anyone who lays their eyes upon it
YACK,YACK,YACK,YACK,man down.
This blue balloon, the month of june!
This Katana melts almost anything it touches instantly
The arcanic beings often lure in their prey with the help of the arcane power they posses.
tool long cba
This ancient axe, once wielded by bel, has guarded the Necropolis for thousands of years
The first object to ever survive a blackhole, now imbued with it's powerful gravity.
A pointy blade that seems to go throught enemies,which also seems to be lightweight.When slashed,you feel as the sky would fall any moment... Thanks to: BeeEasy.
With a blade made of magmarock and a hild of pure flame,one who wields this blade feels its true fiery rage
A bow once used by the lightning God, it shoots lightning-fast projectiles that the eye can barley see
One of many branches laying around in the broken Forest, sharpened into swift and deadly weapon
A wand originating from the far reaches of the universe, imbued with the endless power of millions of stars.
A claw, freshly plucked from the forepaw of the Necropolis' werewolf.
This has literally the simplest name ever, I'm not good at those, okay? Good for chain-rushing.
A dagger forged from the body of a dwarf star, imbued with the energy of a thousand comets.
A prism of the cosmos, capable of warping dimensions, causing mirages of the user to appear everywhere.
Taken from the deep ends of the Trench.
Ths dagger was long lost,before it was found in some old,dark ruins of an cursed place. Wielders of this weapon will suffer,and then die. Thanks to: BeeEasy
A cloak weaved from an unknown material, said to drape it's user in absolute, utter, nothingness.
There is only 1 copy of this cloak... And you o... Well, there might be 2.
A dagger obtainted from the Master Destructor himself...
This foul Katana has doomed many opponents, as it is slowly decaying
Finesse of the high seas, Thanks to: Nekrie.
Once able to open the Bifrost to Asguard, without Heimdallr's magic, the blade is no better than any other mortal sword.
An unearthly metal forged into a blade colder than winter in all of it's fury. Thanks to: Nekrie.
Cut off from the body of the fallen Firebreather and covered in it's searing blood.
Tipped with blazing crystals, the heat from this staff can be felt by even the wielder.
A flask filled with glittering stardust, combined with the venom of a cosmic dragon, able to bring down any foe.
A trap made of flesh from Norghus' collection of corpses
A bow of incredible power, said to be all the energy of a singular galaxy, condensed into one single weapon.
Despite looking like an ordinary shovel, it is not, in fact it contains the limitless power of thousands of souls
This is a acidi... A galactic blaster made up from the greenest of green.
The magical spear that once belonged to the Allfather himself .
A light rustle in the amber sea... Thanks to: Nekrie.
The legendary firearm forged from hard steel and demonic blood containing mighty power.
The resurrected head of the fallen Firebreather attached to a wooden stick allows for full control over the Firebreather's flames.

Object.id: Heavy Bow of the Asgard Guardian
Object.Description: This bow has harvested souls of many dark elves in its lifetime.
A magical staff, containing the remains of power that Hela once held.
A powerful blade, wielded by only the greatest of magical swordsmen, this blade has been lost to obsidian dragon for many ages, lost it is no more...
A slingshot, made from the horns of the trolls
A crystallized crossbow imbued with magical energy, firing icecles that freeze the bones of its victims, readying them for shattering
Taken from the false trickster, the dagger is imbued with a lethal poison.
A bow forged out of Metal and Blood. Thanks to: WizardishG.
Sizzle sizzle sizzle...
A Omega Ancient Sword, Thanks to: MegaLerio223.
This wand was forged with burning rubies, dedicated to what was once a Royal Family
This wand holds what's unknown to the universe. The power of the great realm giant
This bow fires the souls of Elithor's victims.
Despite its fragile and disgusting appearance, this cut-off arm packs a powerful hit.
A cloak woven from the light-manipulating scales of the Shadowscale.
A sword crafted from countless bones collected from the corpses lying around Shadowland.
A sharp bone, cut from the head of the fallen Shadowscale.
An axe that has been shattered in the holy war enchanted by angles, yet shattered can cause quite the blow. Thanks to: Oeti.
too long cba
A staff which holds the power of nature. Losing this staff might severely pollute the realm
A sword forged from a comet, imbued with the energy of a supernova star.
A blade stardust, wielded only by the greatest shinobi, able to slice through the veil of reality itself.
A mysterious staff, glittering with the light of a star, said to contain the energy of many galaxies
It's a little gruesome, but it'll work.
A yummy staff that casts Chocolate Projectiles. Thanks to :pepus
This sword comes from the deepest of mountains, the highest of oceans. Straight from the sky.
A Sword of the Aquatic God, Thanks to: Neva.
A Sword of the Demon Lord, Thanks to: Neva.
Once posessed by the King of the Giants, the sword is the most powerful one within the realm.
This wand was once wielded by the leader of the ancient battle mages. His dark energy continues to pulsate through the wand, making it impossible to command through traditional methods
Collected from the veins of the fallen Firebreather, the blood's fiery structure may have its uses.
Crafted from the seaweed that occupies the Riverborn's face, the sword is agile and very deadly.
Riverborn's wings infused with magic allow the wielder full control over the waters within the river
HOW MANY TIME HAVE I CALL MY NAME FOR YOU
This anciant polearm, once wielded by Thusala, has guarded the Necropolis for thousands of years.
A gross,rather large bow that was crafted from the dead. Thanks to: BeeEasy.
Composed of the arcane essence that allows arcanic beings to exist.
A wand fashioned from the bones of Diagon himself. It draws power from Diagon's necrotic life essence
A golden wand of breathtaking power, created by elemental forces from the realms of ice and flame to unleash revenge on their enemies.
Ripped straight from the ground of te Frozen Queen's domain, this wand pierces your enemies with an unrelenting coldness
Various kinds of stars have been used in the creation of this wand... Maybe.
A suspiciously looking katana
Crafted from the fine wood found in the Broken Forest, this bow will bring style to the way you shoot.
Forged from grudges held too long. Craig had a list. You were on it.
